accessNoteShort: Good to know: Not step-free. See access details.
accessNoteFull: Access: Village terrain. Not step-free. Expect at least one step from the path/parking to the entrance.
accessNoteCollectionBody: Our homes are in traditional hillside villages with uneven paths and steps. They are not step-free, and most entrances involve at least one step from the path or parking area.
pets: Small pets ≤5 kg accepted on request
cancellationPolicy: Please refer to your booking confirmation for cancellation terms.
heroHeadline: Ten stone houses and a hilltop villa in the villages above Elounda.
metaDescriptionHome: Ten traditional stone houses in Mavrikiano and a hillside villa in Vrouchas — Elounda, Crete. Calm stays, direct booking.
metaDescriptionHouses: Browse all ten traditional stone houses in Mavrikiano, Elounda. Filter by size, pool, and accessibility. Book direct.
metaDescriptionLocation: Mavrikiano and Vrouchas sit above Elounda Bay on the northeast coast of Crete. 5 minutes to the sea, away from the noise.
metaDescriptionFaq: Frequently asked questions about Elounda Traditional Homes — access, pools, pets, Wi-Fi, parking, and more.
metaDescriptionPolicies: House rules, access information, pet policy, check-in times, and cancellation terms for Elounda Traditional Homes.
metaDescriptionAbout: About Elounda Traditional Homes — a family-run collection of restored stone houses in Mavrikiano, Elounda, Crete.
metaDescriptionContact: Contact Elounda Traditional Homes — get in touch with questions or booking enquiries.

arrival.instructions: We personally meet our guests at the parking area to assist with luggage and guide you to your home.
arrival.earlyArrival: Early arrivals are welcome to drop luggage at the parking area while we prepare your house.
